title: Make Your Own Shaders
description: This is a Tutorial Series to learn how to make Shaders! There are videos for each file on YouTube that will walk you through and help you learn in a way that is interactive.
body:
This is a Tutorial Series that will teach you how to make your own Shaders!
Each version here has a YouTube video that walks you through everything. It Teaches you in an interactive way, so that you can play around and have fun being creative, instead of just copy-pasting code and not knowing how it works.

Videos:
Episode 1: [https://youtu.be/KuAiWzlu2oo](https://youtu.be/KuAiWzlu2oo)

Episode 2:
https://youtu.be/_DwzgVd1PnU

Episode 3:
[https://youtu.be/9dtdvjQ0dLo?si=bxN94EmjWcuY0MnE](https://youtu.be/9dtdvjQ0dLo?si=bxN94EmjWcuY0MnE)

... More
...you can watch the whole playlist on YouTube, and the files for each episode are also free on Patreon. They are here for anyone who has a problem accessing Patreon. 
Each video should also be linked in the change log for each version.

YouTube Playlist: [https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLn6IKc7V_f-EeKXbz5BI44esnKqtMoXfG&si=sVAdnqv_FwZvtdaC](https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLn6IKc7V_f-EeKXbz5BI44esnKqtMoXfG&si=sVAdnqv_FwZvtdaC)
